assertion_results.text: The unsupported ecosystem notification uses the detected ecosystem name ('Go modules') — not a hard-coded ecosystem name (Step 5.3 unsupported ecosystem handling)
assertion_results.evidence: In unsupported-ecosystem.md line 3: '**Unsupported ecosystem**: Go modules is not yet supported for automated triage.' The ecosystem 'Go modules' was detected during data extraction (data-extraction.md lines 29-31: 'this resolves to **Go modules**') and used dynamically in the notification rather than being hard-coded.

assertion_results.text: The notification follows the template pattern: the message contains the actual ecosystem name substituted into the placeholder, matching the angle-bracket placeholder convention used by other user-facing messages in the skill
assertion_results.evidence: The SKILL.md template (line 418-419) is: '**Unsupported ecosystem**: <ecosystem> is not yet supported for automated triage. Manual assessment is required.' The output in unsupported-ecosystem.md substitutes 'Go modules' for <ecosystem>, producing: '**Unsupported ecosystem**: Go modules is not yet supported for automated triage. Manual assessment is required.' This matches the angle-bracket placeholder convention used by other templates in the skill (e.g., <stream>, <date>, <N> in matrix staleness warning; <CVE-ID>, <severity> in embargo check).

assertion_results.text: Automated triage stops after the unsupported ecosystem notification — no version impact analysis or remediation task creation is performed for the unsupported ecosystem
assertion_results.evidence: Only two output files exist: data-extraction.md and unsupported-ecosystem.md. No version-impact-analysis or remediation-task output files are present. The unsupported-ecosystem.md explicitly confirms on lines 8-11: 'Automated triage for TC-8040 (CVE-2026-31812, quinn-proto) has stopped at Step 1 (Ecosystem Detection)... No version impact analysis, Affects Versions correction, or remediation task creation was performed.' Data-extraction.md line 42 also confirms: 'Automated triage cannot proceed for this ecosystem.'

assertion_results.text: The notification includes both the ecosystem name and the instruction that manual assessment is required
assertion_results.evidence: unsupported-ecosystem.md lines 3-4: '**Unsupported ecosystem**: Go modules is not yet supported for automated triage. Manual assessment is required.' The ecosystem name 'Go modules' and the instruction 'Manual assessment is required' are both present in the notification.
